title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from any Python script.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, stream, and pull models via Ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer; use Ollama models as LLMs, embedders, or tool callers inside LangChain.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style); manage models, multi-user, markdown, code highlighting.

title: ollama-cli (node)
summary: Interactive terminal UI for Ollama built with Node; fuzzy-find models, chat history, keybindings.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub-Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, stream, pull, and list models from JVM apps.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-chatbot (Streamlit)
summary: Streamlit chatbot template that connects to local Ollama; customizable system prompt and UI.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query Ollama models from within notes via slash commands.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for Ollama REST API; compile-time type safety and async HTTP client.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with fluent API; supports chat, streaming, and embeddings in C#.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered apps.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Community index listing unofficial SDKs for Go, Ruby, PHP, Swift, and Dart/Flutter.

title: ollama-rag (LlamaIndex)
summary: LlamaIndex template showing how to build a private RAG system backed by Ollama embeddings and chat.

title: ollama-huggingface
summary: HF space and scripts to convert Hugging Face models into Ollama Modelfile format and push to hub.
